channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [EMBASSY] Embassy REIT Raises ₹ 1,400 Crores via 10-Year NCD Issue
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Embassy Office Parks REIT, India's first listed REIT and the largest office REIT in Asia by area, has successfully raised ₹ 1,400 crores through a 10-year Non-Convertible Debenture (NCD) issuance. The issuance was priced at an attractive fixed coupon of 7.49% and was fully subscribed by one of the largest life insurance companies in India, highlighting strong institutional confidence in Embassy REIT’s credit quality and long-term strategy. This raise is part of Embassy REIT’s broader capital-raising strategy to increase the average duration of its debt stack while market conditions remain favorable.

  • Embassy REIT raised ₹ 1,400 crores via a 10-year NCD issuance.
  • The issuance was priced at a fixed coupon of 7.49% and was fully subscribed by a major life insurance company in India.
  • This raise is part of Embassy REIT’s strategy to increase the average duration of its debt stack.
  • The transaction marks Embassy REIT’s second 10-year debt issuance within this financial year.
  • Embassy REIT has successfully raised ₹ 3,400 crores of 10-year NCDs, doubling the duration of its fixed rate debt book this year.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Embassy Office Parks REIT | Category: Investment

item.title: [SHANKARA] Ballygunge Family Trust Acquires Shares of Shankara Building Products Ltd
item.description:
The Ballygunge Family Trust has acquired 20,000 shares of Shankara Building Products Ltd through the open market. The acquisition represents 0.0824% of the total shares and voting rights of the company. The total shares and voting rights of the company remain unchanged at 2,42,49,326 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each.

  • The Ballygunge Family Trust has acquired 20,000 shares of Shankara Building Products Ltd.
  • The acquisition represents 0.0824% of the total shares and voting rights of the company.
  • The total shares and voting rights of the company remain unchanged at 2,42,49,326 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each.
  • The acquisition was made through the open market.
  • The transaction was disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shankara Building Products Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TCI] Bhoruka Supply Chain Solutions Acquires 1.8% Stake in Transport Corporation of India Ltd
item.description:
Bhoruka Supply Chain Solutions Holdings Ltd has acquired 1800 equity shares of Transport Corporation of India Limited on March 04, 2026, representing approximately 1.8% of the company's total share capital. This acquisition was made through the open market. The total share capital of Transport Corporation of India Ltd is INR 15,34,87,594 consisting of 7,67,43,797 Equity shares of INR 2 each.

  • Bhoruka Supply Chain Solutions Holdings Ltd acquires 1800 shares of Transport Corporation of India Ltd, representing approximately 1.8% stake
  • The acquisition was made on March 04, 2026, through the open market
  • The total share capital of Transport Corporation of India Ltd is INR 15,34,87,594 consisting of 7,67,43,797 Equity shares of INR 2 each
  • This acquisition increases Bhoruka Supply Chain Solutions Holdings Ltd's holding in Transport Corporation of India Ltd to 44.1085%

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRANSPORT CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GAIL] GAIL (India) Ltd Supplier Petronet LNG Limited Issues Force Majeure Notice Due to Maritime Navigation Restrictions and Potential Liquefaction Facility Shutdown
item.description:
🔥 Trending

GAIL (India) Ltd, a prominent name in the natural gas sector, has received a Force Majeure (FM) notice from one of its long-term suppliers, Petronet LNG Limited (PLL). The notice was issued on 3rd March 2026 under the Gas Sale and Purchase Agreement due to constraints faced by certain LNG vessels navigating through the Strait of Hormuz between India and Qatar. Additionally, QatarEnergy, PLL's upstream LNG supplier, has also indicated a potential Force Majeure event due to recent hostilities in the region. As a result, GAIL's LNG allocation from PLL has been reduced to zero since 4th March 2026. The company is currently assessing the situation and its potential impact on downstream customers. LNG supplies from other sources/suppliers remain unaffected at this stage. The full extent of the Force Majeure situation's impact cannot be quantified at the moment, and GAIL is closely monitoring developments and keeping stock exchanges informed of any material updates.

  • Petronet LNG Limited issues Force Majeure notice to GAIL (India) Ltd
  • Constraints faced by LNG vessels navigating through the Strait of Hormuz
  • Potential Force Majeure event indicated by QatarEnergy
  • GAIL's LNG allocation from PLL reduced to zero
  • Company assessing the situation and monitoring developments

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GAIL (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Supply Disruption

item.title: [CANFINHOME] Can Fin Homes Ltd Submits ALM Statement for Q4 2025, Revealing Mismatch and Unavailed Borrowing Limits
item.description:
Can Fin Homes Ltd, a housing finance company, has submitted its Asset Liability Management (ALM) Statement for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The statement reveals a mismatch of -1254.71% in cumulative mismatch and an unavailed borrowing limit of Rs. 3947.41 Cr with various banks and WCDL of Rs. 6000.69 Cr. The filing is in terms of Chapter XVII of SEBI Master Circular for the listing of Commercial Paper.

  • Can Fin Homes Ltd submitted ALM statement for Q4 2025
  • Revealed a cumulative mismatch of -1254.71%
  • Unavailed borrowing limit of Rs. 3947.41 Cr with various banks
  • WCDL of Rs. 6000.69 Cr
  • Filing is in terms of Chapter XVII of SEBI Master Circular for Commercial Paper listing

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAN FIN HOMES LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [HATHWAY] Senior Vice President — Sales, R. Krishna Mohan, Resigns from Hathway Cable & Datacom Ltd
item.description:
Hathway Cable & Datacom Ltd announced the resignation of its Senior Vice President — Sales, Mr. R. Krishna Mohan. Mr. Mohan resigned on February 02, 2026, to pursue a new opportunity outside the company. His resignation was accepted by the company and he was relieved from his duties effective close of business hours on March 04, 2026. Mr. Mohan expressed his gratitude for the support and opportunities provided during his tenure and wished the company and the team continued success.

  • Mr. R. Krishna Mohan resigns from Hathway Cable & Datacom Ltd
  • Resignation effective from February 02, 2026
  • To pursue a new opportunity outside the company
  • Relieved from duties from March 04, 2026
  • Expresses gratitude for the support during his tenure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hathway Cable & Datacom Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Promoters of Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd Acquire Shares Worth 50.08%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

According to a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Rodrigues Bhagvandas Lily, Venkatachalam Prasad Erramilli, and others have acquired shares and warrants/convertible securities/any other instrument that entitles them to receive shares carrying voting rights in Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd. The total acquisition amounts to 50.08% of the company's share capital. This acquisition was made through preferential allotment on March 02, 2026.

  • Rodrigues Bhagvandas Lily and Venkatachalam Prasad Erramilli, along with others, have acquired shares and warrants/convertible securities in Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd.
  • The total acquisition amounts to 50.08% of the company's share capital.
  • The acquisition was made through preferential allotment on March 02, 2026.
  • Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd's equity share capital has increased from ¥51,98,30,020 to ¥2,91,34,33,090.
  • The total voting capital of the company has increased from 5,19,83,002 to 9,13,43,309 equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GRANULES] Granules India’s US Packaging Facility Gets FDA EIR with No Action Indicated Status
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Granules India Limited announced that its US step-down subsidiary, Granules Consumer Health, LLC, has received an Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) with a No Action Indicated (NAI) Status from the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA). The FDA inspection was conducted at the company’s packaging facility in Manassas, Virginia, from December 1 to 3, 2025. This marks the facility’s second FDA inspection, following the March 2023 audit, which also concluded with zero observations.

  • Granules Consumer Health received an Establishment Inspection Report (EIR) with a No Action Indicated (NAI) Status from the US FDA.
  • The inspection was conducted at the company’s packaging facility in Manassas, Virginia, from December 1 to 3, 2025.
  • This is the facility’s second FDA inspection, following the March 2023 audit, which also concluded with zero observations.
  • Granules Consumer Health serves as Granules’ front-end division for OTC products in the U.S.
  • The facility is responsible for packaging both OTC and prescription (Rx) products and serving as a distribution hub for OTC products across the US.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GRANULES INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: USFDA

item.title: [MTNL] MTNL Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons Till 48 Hours After Declaration of FY 2025-26 Financial Results
item.description:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd. (MTNL) has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure is effective from the start date of 01.04.2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of MTNL's audited annual financial results for the financial year 2025-26. The purpose of this closure is to prevent insider trading in securities of MTNL. The decision was made by the Company Secretary.

  • MTNL closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives.
  • Closure effective from 01.04.2026 till 48 hours after declaration of FY 2025-26 financial results.
  • Meant to prevent insider trading in MTNL securities.
  • Decision made by the Company Secretary.
  • Applies to unpublished price sensitive information.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHANAGAR TELEPHONE NIGAM LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [IKS] Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Grants 600,000 Employee Stock Options at Rs. 1,331.00 Each
item.description:
Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd. has granted 600,000 employee stock options under the Employee Stock Option Plan 2022 (the 'IKS ESOP Plan') to certain eligible employees. The options are granted at an exercise price of Rs. 1,331.00 per Option, which is not less than the market price. Each Option is convertible into one fully paid-up equity share covered by these options, amounting to 600,000 equity shares of face value of Re. 1/- each of the Company. The options shall be capable of being exercised anytime during the entire period of continuous active employment from the date of vesting of the respective options.

  • 600,000 employee stock options granted under the IKS ESOP Plan
  • Options granted at an exercise price of Rs. 1,331.00 per Option
  • Each Option convertible into one fully paid-up equity share
  • Options exercisable during the continuous active employment period
  • IKS ESOP Plan administered through a Trust

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd | Category: ESOP
